touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Evelyn Miller expressing interest in improving CS team productivity and exploring automation tools.
Follow-up email sent to Evelyn confirming receipt of inquiry and proposing times for initial qualification call.
Qualification call with Evelyn covered current workflow challenges in CS team and manual note-taking pain points. Discussed team size and use case fit.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for a conversation intelligence tool right now?
questions_asked.answer: CS team spending too much time on manual call notes, need better handoff process

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native integration available

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up call to dive into VortexIO's current tech stack and workflow. Evelyn mentioned they're also evaluating Fireflies but concerned about accuracy.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current call workflow from scheduling to follow-up
questions_asked.answer: Manual notes in docs, inconsistent CRM updates, no standardized process

questions_asked.question: How does your AI accuracy compare to Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Industry-leading transcription accuracy, custom domain training available

objections: Price point seems higher than Fireflies
next_steps: Introduce to Sales Manager for end-user perspective

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with product overview, ROI calculator, and case study from similar professional services company. Requested introduction to Sales Manager David Taylor.

questions_asked.question: Can you share references from other PS firms?
questions_asked.answer: Attached case study, will intro to customer reference

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with both stakeholders

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call focused on technical requirements, compliance needs, and integration architecture. Evelyn confirmed budget authority sits with VP Operations who hasn't been looped in yet.

questions_asked.question: Who typically approves software purchases of this size at VortexIO?
questions_asked.answer: VP Operations, but Evelyn has discretionary budget up to $15K

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention and security model?
questions_asked.answer: SOC2 compliant, configurable retention policies, encrypted at rest and in transit

questions_asked.question: Have you involved David in the evaluation yet?
questions_asked.answer: Planning to bring him in for demo phase

touches.ai_summary: Brief check-in call. Evelyn confirmed demo timing and mentioned Fireflies has lower base pricing but consulting package is appealing for change management support.

questions_asked.question: What does the consulting package include specifically?
questions_asked.answer: Onboarding, workflow design, 30-day adoption support, custom reporting setup

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Evelyn to finalize demo agenda. Discussed metrics they care about most: time-to-close, rep ramp time, forecast accuracy improvement.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a slam-dunk decision for you?
questions_asked.answer: Proven ROI on rep productivity, smooth Salesforce integration, David's buy-in

questions_asked.question: Can we do a trial period before committing?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, 14-day POC available post-demo if needed

touches.ai_summary: Pre-demo email with agenda, technical setup instructions, and demo environment credentials for Evelyn and David.
Demo with Evelyn and David showing live transcription, automated CRM updates, and analytics dashboards. David engaged positively, asked detailed questions about rep adoption. No exec sponsor present.

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take?
questions_asked.answer: 2-3 weeks for standard setup, 4-6 with consulting package

questions_asked.question: What's the learning curve for reps?
questions_asked.answer: Minimal, most productive within first week, consulting helps accelerate

questions_asked.question: Should we include your VP Operations in next steps conversations?
questions_asked.answer: Evelyn will brief them, prefers to validate internally first

next_steps: Send demo recording and proposal draft

touches.ai_summary: Meeting labeled as exec meeting but only Evelyn attended. Discussed proposal structure, pricing tiers, and contract terms. Evelyn noted she needs exec approval but wants to move forward.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the consulting package pricing?
questions_asked.answer: Some flexibility on implementation timeline which affects cost

questions_asked.question: When can we get your VP Operations involved?
questions_asked.answer: Evelyn targeting next week, wants proposal finalized first

objections: Concern about getting exec buy-in without seeing Fireflies proposal first

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up meeting with Evelyn to address questions on annual vs multi-year pricing and consulting scope adjustments. Still no exec engagement.

questions_asked.question: What discount is available for annual prepay?
questions_asked.answer: 10% for annual, 15% for multi-year

questions_asked.question: What's the timeline for decision?
questions_asked.answer: End of quarter, but Fireflies extending their eval period

touches.ai_summary: Shorter check-in with Evelyn. She confirmed VP Operations is aware but hasn't prioritized reviewing yet. Timeline slipping slightly.

questions_asked.question: Any blockers we can help remove?
questions_asked.answer: Just internal scheduling, no technical or fit concerns

touches.ai_summary: Call with Evelyn to review revised proposal. She's advocating internally but mentioned Fireflies came in significantly lower on base price, questioning ROI justification.

questions_asked.question: Can you help me build the business case against the cheaper option?
questions_asked.answer: Provided ROI model showing consulting package pays for itself in 90 days via faster adoption

questions_asked.question: What's Fireflies' pricing looking like?
questions_asked.answer: Evelyn indicated roughly 30% less for base platform

objections: Price gap with Fireflies is significant concern for exec approval
next_steps: Offer to present directly to VP Operations

touches.ai_summary: Extended working session with Evelyn to build internal business case presentation. Covered competitive differentiation, TCO analysis, and implementation risk comparison. Evelyn committed to exec presentation by week's end.

questions_asked.question: What are the real differences in your AI vs Fireflies that justify the premium?
questions_asked.answer: Accuracy benchmarks, vertical-specific models, consulting-led adoption vs DIY

questions_asked.question: If we could close the price gap somewhat, does everything else align?
questions_asked.answer: Evelyn believes so, but needs exec validation on budget

questions_asked.question: Do you have proof points on adoption rates with vs without consulting?
questions_asked.answer: Shared data showing 85% adoption with consulting vs 50% without

next_steps: Evelyn to present to VP Operations
Rep on standby for exec questions

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Evelyn post-exec briefing. VP Operations supportive but requested some scope clarification on consulting deliverables and asked about payment terms.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, with adjusted discount structure

questions_asked.question: Is the VP ready to join a call to discuss directly?
questions_asked.answer: Evelyn prefers to keep iterating through her for now

next_steps: Update proposal with payment terms options

touches.ai_summary: Email with updated proposal reflecting quarterly payment option and detailed consulting SOW. Requested feedback by end of week to meet quarter-end close target.
Meeting with Evelyn to discuss proposal feedback. Legal and procurement now involved. Some pushback on auto-renewal clause and data ownership terms, standard negotiation items.

questions_asked.question: Can we remove auto-renewal and make it opt-in renewal?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can adjust to explicit renewal with 60-day notice

questions_asked.question: Are we still on track for end of quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Tight but possible if legal review moves quickly

objections: Legal concerns about data ownership language

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call was rescheduled by Evelyn due to scheduling conflict with VP Operations. Brief touchpoint confirmed continued interest but timing pressure increasing.

Final negotiation meeting with Evelyn to lock pricing and terms. Agreed on quarterly payments, removed auto-renewal, resolved data ownership language. Evelyn committed to signature pending final exec sign-off, targeting next week.

questions_asked.question: If we sign next week, can we push start date to next quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, flexible on start date with signed contract

questions_asked.question: What's the final approval process from here?
questions_asked.answer: Evelyn and VP Operations signatures, procurement processes final paperwork
